---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for VoicERA
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow you want to improve.
What pain point does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can about behavior,
UI, or API changes.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, or workarounds you're using today.

## Scope

Which part(s) of the stack does this touch?

- [ ] Frontend (dashboard)
- [ ] Backend (API / auth / integrations)
- [ ] Voice server (Pipecat pipeline)
- [ ] AI4Bharat STT/TTS servers
- [ ] Documentation / developer experience
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar projects, or references to related issues/PRs.

> **Note:** For large features (new provider integrations, telephony providers,
> skill/tool-calling frameworks), please open an issue for discussion **before**
> submitting a PR. See [AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md) for what is implemented today.
